steps.title: Substitute the given input and output
steps.content:
The function is $f(x)=4x+b$, and $f(7)=28$. Substitute $x=7$ and $f(x)=28$:
$$28=4(7)+b$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: If $b=1$, $4$, or $7$, then $f(7)$ would be greater than $28$. Only $b=0$ keeps $f(7)=28$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $b=0$, which matches Choice A — $0$. Therefore A is correct.
